title: թանալ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: թափել
definition: to empty, to pour out, to spill.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թափեմ (tʿapʿem, “to pour, to spill”).

title: թե
definition: that, or, if, so that, in order to.

title: թեք
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թեքեմ (tʿekʿem, “to incline, to bend”).

title: թթվել
definition: to turn sour, to feel depressed.

title: թի
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: թիթեղ
definition: thin sheet of metal, tin plate.
new_etymology: Borrowed from Turkish tıtağ (“tin, sheet metal”).

title: թումբ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: թուրք
definition: Turk (person from Turkey or of Turkish descent).

title: թվանք
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: թրծել
definition: to burn bricks or pots, to harden.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian թրծեմ (tʿrcʿem, “to bake, to harden”).

title: թրև
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.
